evals.prompt: I need download cert for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-download skill for this certificate download request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects certificate-download for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_download.
Keeps the response focused on downloading SSL/TLS certificate chain from a remote domain and saving to PEM files.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused certificate download workflow for example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-download skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-download instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
